---
title: "AAC Website"
format: 
  html:
    code-links:
      href: AACweb2.html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
library(quarto)
library(bslib)
library(tidyverse)
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

```{r pt 1}
#| echo: false
df = read.csv("C:/Users/jakey/Downloads/merged-exam-rps-data.csv")
df$SellerName <- toupper(df$SellerName)
df$SellerName <- trimws(df$SellerName)
df$BuyerName <- toupper(df$BuyerName)
df$BuyerName <- trimws(df$BuyerName)
df$DocumentDate <- as.Date(df$DocumentDate, "%Y-%m-%d")
df$Yr <- format(df$DocumentDate, "%Y")
df$Address <- gsub("\\s+", " ", toupper(trimws(df$Address)))
df$ZipCode <- substr(df$ZipCode, 1, 5)
df$ZipCode[df$ZipCode %in% c("WA", "98", "0", "")] <- NA

```

```{r pt 2}
#| panel: fill
#| echo: false

my_thing <- df %>% group_by(YrBuilt) %>% summarize("Price" <- mean(SalePrice))

plot(my_thing$YrBuilt, my_thing$`"Price" <- mean(SalePrice)`, xlab = "Year Built", ylab = "Mean Price")


```

```{r pt 3}
#| echo: false
page_fluid(

  layout_column_wrap(

    card(
      card_header("GDP Growth"),
      "2.3%"
    ),

    card(
      card_header("Unemployment"),
      "4.1%"
    ),

    card(
      card_header("Inflation"),
      "2.7%"
    )
  )
)



```

## Start Tabset {.panel-tabset}

### First Tab

Welcome to the first tab

```{r 2.1}
#| echo: false
2 + 2
```

### Second Tab

Welcome to the second tab

## Close
